summary: First test run complete. All backend APIs (18/18 tests) and frontend flows tested successfully. App is working correctly with both condomino and admin user flows.

minor.issue: JWT secret key is 28 bytes (below recommended 32 bytes minimum for SHA256). Warning logged in backend.

issues: shadow* style props deprecated warnings in console (use boxShadow instead) - non-breaking but should be updated

action_items: Update JWT_SECRET in backend/.env to be at least 32 bytes to eliminate warning
Replace shadow* style props with boxShadow in StyleSheet.create() calls across all screens
Consider updating @react-native-async-storage/async-storage from 3.0.1 to 2.2.0 for better compatibility (non-critical)
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ All API endpoints use proper /api prefix
✓ Environment variables correctly configured (EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL, MONGO_URL, DB_NAME)
✓ MongoDB _id properly excluded from responses using clean_doc()
✓ JWT auth properly implemented with token validation
✓ All React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, etc.)
✓ testID attributes present on all interactive elements
✓ Error handling implemented for API calls
✓ Italian language used throughout as required
✓ Mobile-first design with proper spacing (8pt grid visible)
✓ Color palette matches requirements: Navy #1B3A5C, Sky #5B9BD5
seed_data_creation: Seed data verified working: admin@tardugno.it/admin123 and mario.rossi@email.it/password123 both created successfully with 2 condomini and 3 initial avvisi
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working. Backend has comprehensive pytest test suite that can be reused. Frontend flows verified with Playwright. No blocking issues found. Minor improvements suggested around JWT secret length and deprecated shadow props.
